chunks.title: Judgment on Egypt
chunks.reason: Introduces Yahweh's coming to Egypt and the initial political chaos.

chunks.title: Ecological and Economic Collapse
chunks.reason: Describes the drying of the Nile and the ruin of Egypt's industries.

chunks.title: The Folly of Egyptian Leaders
chunks.reason: Critiques the wisdom of Pharaoh's counselors and predicts Judah's terror.

chunks.title: Restoration and Unity
chunks.reason: Prophesies the conversion of Egypt, a highway to Assyria, and Israel's role.
